name: First & Peoples Bank And Trust Company
description_short: FDIC-insured community bank offering checking, savings, loans, and trust services to customers in Greenup County, Kentucky and surrounding areas.
description_long:
First & Peoples Bank and Trust Company is a regional bank serving Greenup County, Kentucky and neighboring communities including Flatwoods and Russell. The institution is FDIC-insured, backed by the full faith and credit of the U.S. Government, providing deposit protection up to applicable limits.

The bank offers a comprehensive range of personal and business banking products. On the deposit side, customers can access checking accounts, savings accounts, CDs, and IRAs. Loan products include personal loans and business loans. The bank also provides trust services including portfolio account management, estate planning support, and retirement planning. Additional services include NetBanker online banking, Touch Tone Teller phone banking, debit cards with EMV chip technology, safe deposit boxes, check ordering, and a Platinum VISA card product.

First & Peoples Bank distinguishes itself through community engagement and fraud prevention education. The bank has partnered with CRA Partners and the Senior Housing Crime Prevention Foundation to address elderly financial abuse, a significant issue affecting 2 million seniors annually. The website provides extensive resources on fraud prevention, including educational materials about check counterfeiting, phishing scams, and identity theft. The bank emphasizes customer security through educational quizzes and regular FDIC Consumer News updates.

As a regional community bank, First & Peoples Bank is best suited for customers in its service area seeking personalized banking relationships with local branch access. The bank's primary limitation is geographic—it primarily serves Greenup County, Kentucky, making it inaccessible to customers outside this region. While competitive in standard banking products, the bank does not appear to offer specialized services like investment management beyond basic trust services. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
services: NetBanker online banking and electronic bill pay
Platinum VISA cards with transaction alerts
pros: FDIC-insured deposits with full government backing
Comprehensive product suite including personal/business loans, checking, savings, CDs, IRAs, and trust services
Online banking through NetBanker with bill pay and fund transfers
EMV chip debit cards with fraud protection and Visa transaction alerts
Dedicated elderly fraud protection partnership with CRA Partners and Senior Housing Crime Prevention Foundation
Local branch and ATM access in Greenup County area
Safe deposit boxes and trust department services available
cons: Limited geographic service area restricted to Greenup County, Kentucky and immediate surrounding towns
No online account opening mentioned; may require in-person application
Website lacks specific details on APR rates, fees, or competitive product terms
No mention of mobile app availability despite mentioning 'ANYtime Banking'
Limited information about business loan products, terms, or small business support
best_for: Residents and businesses in Greenup County, Kentucky seeking local banking relationships
Seniors concerned about financial exploitation who value bank partnership with fraud prevention organizations
Customers preferring established regional banks with FDIC insurance over fintech alternatives
Small business owners in the service area needing commercial checking and loan products
diagnosis: First & Peoples Bank is best for customers in Greenup County, Kentucky seeking traditional community banking with FDIC insurance, local branch access, and products including checking, savings, loans, and trust services. The primary caveat is strict geographic limitation—the bank only serves Greenup County and immediate surrounding areas, making it inaccessible to customers outside this region.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
